package.name: bloom_maxcal_sim
package.description:
Maximum Caliber-based algae bloom following with a simulated 2D rover.
Implements the adaptive algal-bloom sampling scenario from Section VI.C of "Kernel Dynamics under Path Entropy Maximization" (arXiv:2603.27880). The bloom field is modelled as a superposition of anisotropic Gaussian patches advecting under a double-gyre stream function. The MaxCal controller selects velocity commands from a path-entropy-maximising distribution over candidate waypoints, using the kernelcal library for Lagrange multiplier fitting and HS-kernel trajectory tracking.
package.author: Jnaneshwar Das
